full_text:
Gongsun Yue 公孫越
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Gongsun Yue (公孫越)was born in Liaoxi. Assassinated by Yuan Shao after a diplomatic mission. Served as envoy to Yuan Shu. Gongsun Yue was affiliated with Gongsun Zan. Gongsun Yue lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
